description: Read a Unity SerializedProperty target for View property validation. Provide a concrete target; package files are still read and edited through normal file tools.

target.description: Concrete property target. Fields: kind, guid, path, scenePath, objectPath, componentType, componentIndex, propertyPath.

maxDepth.description: Optional traversal depth cap. Defaults to the Unity bridge default.

maxArrayItems.description: Optional array item cap. Defaults to the Unity bridge default.
